troparion: (Tone 1) Forget not your servants who call upon You, O Lord;* remember, we beseech You, that we always place our hope in You,* and come to our aid, O almighty God.
prokimenon: This is the gate of the Lord,
the just shall enter into it.
Give praise to the Lord, for He is good.
second_prokimenon: I have run the way of Your commandments,
Set before me for a law the way of You justifications, O Lord.
